classes.reasoning: Document is labeled 'eCRF -- CYCLE 1 DAY 8 VISIT' in the header and contains per-patient, per-visit data capture fields including vital signs, laboratory results, adverse events, and drug compliance for a specific patient visit. summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) documenting a Cycle 1 Day 8 visit for patient BRC471-ES01-011 in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The form captures vital signs, laboratory results (hematology and chemistry), adverse events (Grade 2 diarrhea and Grade 1 dry mouth), and drug compliance data (98.2% adherence) collected on 13 January 2024 at site ES-01.
